title: astragalus pseudotomentellus
intro: Astragalus pseudotomentellus, also known as the Astragalus root or Huang Qi, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which enable it to boost the body's natural defenses and resilience to stress. The medicinal properties of Astragalus pseudotomentellus are attributed to its high content of polysaccharides, flavonoids, and saponins, which provide a range of health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Astragalus pseudotomentellus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often used to support the immune system, reduce fatigue, and improve overall well-being.
